title: Economic Policy Review

source.name: Federal Reserve Bank of New York

summary: This is a journal index page listing research articles from the New York Fed's Economic Policy Review spanning 1995-2017, including papers on inflation gauges, macroprudential policy, Treasury issuance, and financial institution supervision. The page contains no specific market structure or macro catalyst analysis.
key_points: Index page for New York Fed's Economic Policy Review journal
Sample articles include inflation measurement, macroprudential policy, and Treasury market analysis
No specific market structure or macro catalyst content on this page
Most recent dated content appears to be from 2016-2017
why_it_matters: This page provides access to Fed research but contains no actionable market insights. Researchers seeking specific macro catalyst or market structure analysis should navigate to individual article pages rather than this index.

issues_found: Source is a listing_page/index page - violates Rule 5 (reject container/navigation/listing pages)

No actionable market structure or macro catalyst content on this page
event_type correctly set to 'unknown' but listing pages are categorically unsuitable for archival

notes: This is a navigation/index page for the Economic Policy Review, not a specific research article. The source provides no specific publication date for the page itself. Content samples include articles on underlying inflation gauges (Marlene Amstad, Simon Potter, Robert Rich), Government Securities Clearing Corporation (Jeffrey F. Ingber), macroprudential policy tabletop exercises (Tobias Adrian et al.), and Treasury bill issuance effects (Paul Glasserman et al.). While topics touch on financial market structure and macro policy, the page itself contains no actionable market structure or macro catalyst content—only metadata and article listings.
